untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires visual/morphological analysis: detection of 'twin peaks at same price level', 'wide rounded left peak', and 'narrow sharp inverted-V right peak'. These shape characteristics cannot be expressed using only the allowed price/volume indicators and operators. Would require pattern recognition library or custom shape-detection logic.
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate using price equality and body size constraints, but the core pattern detection (eve & adam morphology) is fundamentally untranslatable with available indicators. Exit condition set to crossing above SMA_20 as reasonable reversal signal per source text guidance on post-breakout behavior (days 14-21 in bear markets).
